location: Not a fixed pickup — an enemy drop from Skeleton Mages (and occasionally Giant Beast Skeletons) found across several graveyard/catacomb areas. Easiest early farm: Skeleton Mages between Saint's Bridge and Summonwater Village, and inside Summonwater Village itself.
region: Limgrave (best early farm spot; the enemy type also appears in Liurnia and Crumbling Farum Azula)
tactics: Farm Skeleton Mages specifically — regular skeletons don't carry it (~2% base drop chance)
Rest at Saint's Bridge or Summonwater Village grace, kill the mage(s), reset at grace, repeat
Boost item discovery (Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot, Arcane, or a discovery talisman) to speed up the roll
Alternate farm spots near Lake-Facing Cliffs and southeast of Caria Manor if Limgrave spawns feel slow
lore: An old grave-keeper's tool as much as a weapon — a heavy blade lashed to a bent stave, once used by those who tended the Lands Between's forgotten burial grounds and believed to ward off restless spirits.

builds.name: Str/Dex hybrid bleed
builds.why: Base scaling favors Strength over Dexterity; Heavy affinity pushes it into a pure-Strength bleed stick, Keen converts it into a Dexterity one instead
